title: OCL: Organizational Control Layer — Governance Infrastructure at the Execution Boundary of LLM Agent Systems
title_zh: OCL：LLM Agent 执行边界的组织控制层治理基础设施
authors: Tianyu Shi, Yang Mo, Yiou Liu, Zhuonan Hao, Yin Wang, Wenzhuo Hu, Nan Yu, Meng Zhou, Jiangbo Yu
affiliation: McGill / Purdue / UNSW / UCLA / NYU / Stevens / Aimaikj Research
method_en: OCL inserts a model-agnostic interception layer between an LLM agent's action proposal and environment execution. A two-stage PolicyLayer (symbolic rules + MLP classifier) approves, blocks, or escalates each proposed action. An EscalationHandler resolves ambiguous cases via conservative fallback or human review, all without modifying the underlying LLM.
method_zh: OCL 在 LLM agent 生成动作提案之后、环境执行之前插入模型无关的拦截层，通过两阶段 PolicyLayer（符号规则 + MLP 分类器）对提案进行批准/拦截/升级，EscalationHandler 处理模糊案例，无需修改底层 LLM。
innovation_en: Framing the execution boundary as a separation-of-concerns problem — 'proposal generation vs. environment-facing execution' — is a novel organizational abstraction distinct from input/output guardrails or tool-use filters.
innovation_zh: 抽象为关注点分离问题（提案生成 vs. 环境执行），不同于 input/output guardrail 或工具调用过滤，是组织架构层面的新颖贡献。
key_metrics: AgenticPay adversarial negotiation: unsafe execution rate 88%→~0%; valid success rate 12%→96% (multiple frontier LLM backends)

title: E-VAds: An E-commerce Short Videos Understanding Benchmark for MLLMs
title_zh: E-VAds：面向 MLLM 的电商短视频理解基准
authors: Xianjie Liu, Yiman Hu, Liang Wu, Ping Hu, Yixiong Zou, Jian Xu, Bo Zheng
method_en: E-VAds introduces a Multimodal Information Density Assessment Framework to quantify tri-modal complexity of e-commerce videos. 3,961 high-quality videos from Taobao are curated, with 19,785 open-ended QA pairs generated by a multi-agent system covering commercial intent, product attributes, and CTA recognition.
method_zh: E-VAds 提出多模态信息密度评估框架，量化电商视频三模态复杂度。从淘宝精选 3,961 个高质量视频，由多智能体系统生成 19,785 个涵盖商业意图、商品属性、CTA 识别的开放式问题。
innovation_en: First benchmark specifically designed for e-commerce short video MLLM evaluation; tri-modal density framework enables data-driven benchmark design; reveals systematic MLLM shortfalls in commercial intent understanding.
innovation_zh: 首个专为电商短视频设计的 MLLM 评测基准；三模态信息密度框架为基准设计提供量化工具；揭示主流 MLLM 在商业意图理解上的系统性不足。
key_metrics: 3,961 Taobao videos / 19,785 QA pairs; all major MLLMs degrade significantly on high-density e-commerce videos vs. general-purpose benchmarks

title: LARM: LLM-Alignment Live-Streaming Recommendation
title_zh: LARM：面向直播推荐的 LLM 对齐框架
authors: Yueyang Liu, Jiangxia Cao, Shen Wang, Shuang Wen, Xiang Chen, Xiangyu Wu, Shuang Yang, Zhaojie Liu, Kun Gai, Guorui Zhou
method_en: LARM fine-tunes an open-source LLM on live-streaming data to generate context-aware embeddings that capture temporal semantics. A gated mechanism aligns LLM embeddings with ID embeddings. Aligned representations are converted to learnable semantic codes compatible with existing retrieval and ranking pipelines.
method_zh: LARM 在直播数据上微调 LLM 生成随时间变化的上下文感知 embedding；通过门控机制将 LLM embedding 与 ID embedding 融合对齐；将对齐后表示转换为可学习的语义 code，无缝接入现有召回排序系统。
innovation_en: Addresses the 'static live room' problem in recommendation; LLM-ID alignment + temporal semantic code is a deployment-practical design from Kuaishou's production system.
innovation_zh: 痛点；LLM-ID 对齐 + 语义 code 设计已在快手生产系统验证，工程落地实用。
key_metrics: Online significant improvement on Kuaishou live-streaming recommendation; three innovations each validated by ablation study

title: TAP-PER: Beyond Retrieval — Learning Compact User Representations for Scalable LLM Personalization
title_zh: TAP-PER：超越检索——面向可扩展 LLM 个性化的紧凑用户表示学习
authors: Heng Cao, Fan Zhang, Jian Yao, Yujie Zheng, Changlin Zhao, Lu Hao, Yuxuan Wei, Wangze Ni, Huaiyu Fu, Yuqian Sun, Xuyan Mo
method_en: TAP-PER encodes user preferences as learnable prefix embeddings, decomposing personalization into a user-state prefix (long-term) and query-conditioned record prefix (short-term intent). Temporal signals capture evolving user interests. Prefixes are injected into the LLM's KV cache without modifying model parameters.
method_zh: TAP-PER 将用户偏好编码为可学习 prefix 嵌入：user-state prefix 捕捉长期偏好，query-conditioned record prefix 动态激活即时意图，引入时序信号捕捉兴趣演化，注入 LLM KV cache 无需修改模型参数。
innovation_en: Dual-prefix decomposition enables scalable, storage-efficient personalization at billion-user scale; replaces retrieval quality dependency and per-user adapter overhead simultaneously.
innovation_zh: 双前缀分解实现亿级用户可扩展个性化，同时消除检索依赖和重量级 per-user adapter 开销。
key_metrics: Quality on-par or better vs. retrieval/LoRA baselines; storage overhead significantly reduced (per-user prefix vector only)

title: RUBAS: Rubric-Based Reinforcement Learning for Agent Safety
title_zh: RUBAS：基于 Rubric 的智能体安全强化学习
method_en: RUBAS decomposes agent safety into four dimensions (tool-use safety, argument safety, response safety, helpfulness) and designs structured rubrics providing fine-grained rewards across complete agent trajectories. RL is applied to jointly optimize safe tool use and task completion.
method_zh: RUBAS 将 agent 安全行为分解为四维度（工具调用安全、参数安全、响应安全、有用性），设计结构化 Rubric 提供细粒度奖励信号，在完整 trajectory 上执行 RL，联合优化安全工具调用与任务完成。
innovation_en: Four-dimension rubric decomposition provides interpretable, precise RL signals beyond coarse refusal; applicable to e-commerce merchant/CS agents requiring fine-grained safety control.
innovation_zh: 四维度 Rubric 分解提供比粗粒度拒绝信号更精确的可解释 RL 奖励，适用于电商商家/客服 agent 的精细安全控制。
key_metrics: Improved safety over alignment baselines; reduced tool hallucination; competitive helpfulness (multiple benchmarks)

title: PHF: Beyond Isolated Behaviors — Hierarchical User Modeling for LLM Personalization
title_zh: PHF：超越孤立行为——面向 LLM 个性化的层次用户建模
authors: Liang Wang, Xinyi Mou, Xiaoyou Liu, Tiannan Wang, Yuqing Wang, Zhongyu Wei
method_en: PHF applies Bourdieu's social theory to LLM personalization: Practice (individual behaviors) → Habitus (temporal accumulation into stable dispositions) → Field (shared patterns across similar users). Three computational layers jointly guide personalized LLM output.
method_zh: PHF 借鉴布尔迪厄实践理论，将 LLM 个性化重构为三层次：Practice（单次行为）→ Habitus（时序积累稳定倾向）→ Field（跨用户群体共性），三层次综合指导 LLM 个性化输出。
innovation_en: Cross-disciplinary import of sociological theory into LLM personalization provides a principled hierarchical decomposition; Field layer introduces collaborative-filtering-like community signal within LLM framework.
innovation_zh: 将社会学实践理论引入 LLM 个性化，Field 层在 LLM 框架内引入类协同过滤的群体信号，理论基础充分。
key_metrics: Multi-task personalization benchmarks: all three PHF levels validated by ablation

title: Can LLMs Clean Up Your Mess? A Survey of Application-Ready Data Preparation with LLMs
title_zh: LLM 能帮你清理数据吗？LLM 在生产就绪数据准备中的综述
authors: Wei Zhou, Jun Zhou, Haoyu Wang, Zhenghao Li, Qikang He, Shaokun Han, Guoliang Li, Xuanhe Zhou, Yeye He, Chunwei Liu, ...
method_en: Systematic survey of LLM-driven data preparation covering three task categories: data cleaning (standardization, error processing, imputation), data integration (entity matching, schema matching), and data enrichment (annotation, profiling, synthesis). Charts the paradigm shift from rule-based pipelines to prompt-driven agentic workflows.
method_zh: 系统梳理 LLM 用于数据准备的研究，覆盖数据清洗（标准化、错误修复、填充）、数据集成（实体匹配、Schema 匹配）、数据增强（标注、画像、合成）三大任务，归纳从规则 pipeline 到 prompt 驱动 agent 化工作流的范式转移。
innovation_en: First comprehensive 'LLM × data preparation' taxonomy; highlights emerging agentic workflows relevant to e-commerce product data quality pipelines.
innovation_zh: 首个系统性 LLM × 数据准备分类框架；强调 agentic 工作流趋势，对电商商品数据清洗/标注 pipeline 设计具指导价值。
key_metrics: Survey; no single SOTA delta. Covers major methods across entity matching / imputation / annotation sub-tasks.
